prs.title: P0 Ace Todos
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Large batch of TODO/planning docs, ACE API solutions work, validation/enums, and bug fixes across 62 files representing significant planning architecture and feature scaffolding work.

prs.title: fix: remove false-positive error keyword from ResearchArchive skip log
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-line fix removing a false-positive error keyword from a log message.

prs.title: fix: use rejectUnauthorized:true for Redis TLS connections
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Trivial security configuration fix setting rejectUnauthorized:true across three Redis TLS connection files.

prs.title: Doc updates
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Massive documentation overhaul spanning 131 files including env examples, git hooks, README, and a large archive of release notes — substantial effort but primarily doc/config authoring rather than code logic.

prs.title: docs: engineer onboarding guide + architecture/ECS updates
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: New engineer onboarding guide plus architecture and ECS infrastructure documentation updates across 6 files with 318 lines of meaningful written content.

prs.title: test: revamp unit suite + document E2E DB setup (Phase 1)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Revamped unit test suite with new test files, vitest config, git hooks, updated admin actions, user-type management, and E2E DB setup documentation across 16 files.

prs.title: Simplify .env.example; remove apprunner artifacts
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Minor housekeeping PR simplifying .env.example and removing AppRunner artifacts across 7 config/yaml files with only 13 net additions.

prs.title: docs: overhaul documentation and re-enable admin docs viewer
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Comprehensive documentation overhaul across 115 files including re-enabling admin docs viewer, updated README, and a large archive of historical release notes — high volume but primarily doc/config work.

prs.title: Enable Maturity Stage in portfolio column picker
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-file change enabling Maturity Stage in the portfolio column picker, likely a one-line or trivial config addition.

prs.title: Staging - secret api
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Introduces a secret API integration for AWS Partner Finder with two new stage-two collectors, a client library, research archive integration, unit tests, and a TODO planning doc across 6 files.

prs.title: fix: strip query/hash in normalizeHostname (Partner Finder)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small targeted bug fix stripping query strings and hash fragments in normalizeHostname with a corresponding test update across 2 files.

prs.title: feat: resolve AWS Partner Finder data via public API (badges + tier)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Full feature implementation resolving AWS Partner Finder data via a public API including client library, two collectors for badges and tier, research archive integration, unit tests, and planning docs across 6 files.

stories.name: AWS Partner Finder Integration
stories.rationale: Delivered end-to-end AWS Partner Finder functionality including public API resolution for badges and tier data, secure secret API access in staging, and a hostname normalization bug fix.

stories.name: Core Platform Stability & Quality
stories.rationale: Addressed high-priority platform todos, overhauled the unit test suite with E2E database setup documentation, and eliminated a false-positive error in research archive logging.

stories.name: Documentation & Developer Onboarding Overhaul
stories.rationale: Comprehensively improved developer experience by overhauling platform documentation, re-enabling the admin docs viewer, adding an engineer onboarding guide, and updating architecture and ECS references.

stories.name: Infrastructure Security & Environment Hygiene
stories.rationale: Hardened infrastructure security by enforcing TLS certificate validation for Redis connections and cleaned up environment configuration by removing stale App Runner artifacts.

stories.name: Portfolio Maturity Stage Visibility
stories.rationale: Enabled users to surface the Maturity Stage field in the portfolio column picker, improving business readiness visibility in portfolio views.
